title: Delissea argutidentata
taxonomy: Delissea argutidentata is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant is endemic to Hawaii, a US state in the Pacific Ocean. It is a shrub that grows in the wild, typically found in high elevation environments. The classification of Delissea argutidentata is as follows: it is in the genus Delissea, which is part of the tribe Vaccinieae, and the family Ericaceae. The plant is also sometimes referred to as a member of the subgenus Delissea.
